bug.description: missing range validation on configuration parameter allowing out-of-spec values

prompt:
There is a missing range validation on configuration parameter allowing out-of-spec values downstream of function update_cellgroup_for_reestablishment in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/mac_rrc_dl_handler.c:663.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
